title: Community Business Workshop
passage:
The East Harbor Business Association will host a free workshop for local shop owners on July 18 at the Civic Learning Center. The session will focus on practical ways to improve in-store displays, manage seasonal promotions, and communicate with returning customers.

The workshop begins at 9:30 A.M. and ends at 12:00 P.M. Participants are encouraged to bring one example of a current advertisement or product display. A short consultation period will be available after the main session, but spaces are limited and will be assigned in the order registrations are received.

To register, send your name, business name, and phone number to events@eastharbor.example by July 10.

questions.prompt: Who is the workshop intended for?
questions.explanation: 冒頭に for local shop owners とあり、地域の店舗オーナー向けのワークショップです。

questions.prompt: What are participants encouraged to bring?

choices.text: A current advertisement or product display
A copy of last year's sales report

questions.explanation: 本文に bring one example of a current advertisement or product display と説明されています。

title: Business Notice 1
passage:
The North Avenue Business Center will hold a practical session about inventory on August 10. The session is intended for small business owners who want to improve daily operations without adding expensive systems. Participants will review sample checklists, compare common problems, and discuss simple ways to communicate changes to staff.

The event begins at 10:00 A.M. in Room 100. Registration is free, but seats are assigned in the order requests are received. To register, send your name and business name to events@example.local.

questions.prompt: Who is the event intended for?
questions.explanation: 本文に small business owners 向けの実用セッションとあります。

questions.prompt: How are seats assigned?

choices.text: In the order requests are received

questions.explanation: 本文に seats are assigned in the order requests are received とあります。
